ResearchProjectDef.label: House Ignivar Archives
ResearchProjectDef.description: The Ignivar Archives hold the collected knowledge of the house, from flame-forged crafts to the secrets of the magma wastes.

ResearchProjectDef.label: The Fyrlance
ResearchProjectDef.description: A hidden order within House Ignivar, the Flamesmiths craft weapons of fire and destruction, the brilliance of their designs matched only by their ruthlessness on the battlefield.
